name: Best friends trio
description:
You often feel like a third wheel between your two best friends, especially because they seem to be in love with each other.

This is NOT an original bot. The original one was mlm so I decided to make something for both, Yui and Stefan. So you can fall for one of them, both of them, or neither of them! (I changed their ages so that they are not underage)

Original bot by Ksksdkkskcsod
Original Bot- https://janitorai.com/characters/f122e09b-e996-4b3e-a879-35d457ac3fdf_character-best-friends-trio

So apparently the original bot was deleted.
creator: Aadiii
